meaning: n.[化]大麻的化学成分(可指任何一种,如大麻醇、四氢大麻醇等)
examples: Cannabinoid production starts when an enzyme causes geranyl pyrophosphate and olivetolic acid.
The present application relates to cannabinoid receptor ligands containing compounds of formula (I) wherein a, R1, R2, and R3 are as defined in the specification.
Also disclosed are pharmaceutical compositions and combinations containing said compounds and their USES as thrombin receptor antagonists and binders to cannabinoid receptors.
Acomplia blocks the cannabinoid cell receptor famous for giving pot smokers the munchies.
Understanding the mechanism of cannabinoid-induced analgesia has been increased through the study of cannabinoid receptors, endocannabinoids, and synthetic agonists and antagonists.
